title: Assertion
description: Checks a condition on the response. Attached to a sampler or controller. Can check status code, body content, headers, or response time.

target.description: What part of the response to assert against.

header_name.description: The specific header name to check when target is 'header'.

condition.description: The type of comparison to perform.

value.description: The expected value. For 'matches', a regex pattern. For 'jsonpath'/'xpath', the expression. For 'less_than'/'greater_than', a numeric threshold. Supports ${varName} interpolation for string values.

negate.description: If true, the assertion passes when the condition does NOT match.
